note: Source of truth for AllyOS peptide product packaging. This file defines OPERATIONAL/EDUCATIONAL structure only. Consent and intake documents are generated on-device through the Visit Packet; static distribution of consent/intake is gated to the provider's own legal review. Nothing here sells peptides — it sells reference, SOPs, cadence, and software.

consent_tiers.2: Enhanced — FDA-approved off-label / Grade B (2–3 pg, off-label disclosure)
consent_tiers.3: Comprehensive experimental — Grade C / investigational / not-FDA-approved (4–6 pg, experimental attestation)
consent_tiers.4: Maximal — Grade D, generally not recommended (6–10 pg, maximum disclosure)

practice_pack.label: Peptide Practice Pack
practice_pack.one_line: Everything a clinic needs to run ONE peptide — the AmSpa per-treatment SOP value, peptide-specific.
includes: Clinical SOP (rule-out / Rx / labs / ongoing-care / safety gate)
Per-peptide informed consent at the peptide's matched tier
Clinical/metabolic intake screen (shared per line, reused)

delivery.sop_cadence_monograph: Sold to the licensed provider — educational/operational, low-liability, sellable now.
delivery.consent_intake: Generated on-device via the Visit Packet (PHI-free). Static distribution of signed templates is GATED to the provider's legal review.

metabolic_line.label: Metabolic
metabolic_line.shared_intake_note: One metabolic red-flag screen (MTC/MEN2, pancreatitis, pregnancy, gallbladder, eating disorder, T1DM, GFR<30) covers every peptide below — authored once, reused across any selection.

glp1_continuous.name: Semaglutide
glp1_continuous.class_note: GLP-1 backbone. Continuous — not cycled. Never run concurrently with another GLP-1; TRANSITION between agents instead.

glp1_continuous.name: Tirzepatide
glp1_continuous.class_note: GIP/GLP-1 backbone. Continuous — not cycled. Transition, do not co-administer with another incretin.

glp1_continuous.name: Retatrutide
glp1_continuous.class_note: Triple agonist backbone. Continuous. NOT approved — forces Tier-3 experimental consent even though trial-grade is B.

cyclable_adjuncts.name: AOD-9604
cyclable_adjuncts.class_note: GH-fragment lipolysis adjunct. Cyclable. Grade D → maximum-disclosure consent; modest, adjunctive only.

cyclable_adjuncts.name: MOTS-c
cyclable_adjuncts.class_note: Mitochondrial-derived metabolic adjunct. Cyclable. PCAC review July 2026.

cyclable_adjuncts.name: SS-31 (Elamipretide)
cyclable_adjuncts.fda_status: Elamipretide FDA-approved (FORZINITY, Barth syndrome 2025); compounded metabolic use is off-label/investigational
cyclable_adjuncts.class_note: Mitochondrial-targeting adjunct. Cyclable. Approved drug exists, but metabolic/wellness use here is off-label → Tier 3.

cyclable_adjuncts.name: Sermorelin
cyclable_adjuncts.fda_status: off-label (Geref was FDA-approved for pediatric dx; adult wellness use is off-label)
cyclable_adjuncts.class_note: GHRH analog. Used in a weight-loss stack as a lean-mass / body-composition adjunct alongside a GLP-1 — complements appetite suppression, does not overlap it. Cyclable.

transition_protocol.label: GLP-1 Transition / Switch Protocol
transition_protocol.one_line: Because GLP-1s overlap and are never concurrent — the SOP for switching one backbone to another (sema ↔ tirze ↔ reta ↔ lira).
includes: Wash-out / overlap timing per agent half-life
Re-consent at the new agent's tier (Retatrutide → Tier 3)

glp1_package.label: GLP-1 Package
glp1_package.one_line: A single continuous GLP-1 backbone, sold as a complete package — NOT a stack.
glp1_package.why_not_a_stack: GLP-1/incretins are continuous and overlap mechanistically — you never run two together, you transition between them. So a GLP-1 is sold as its own package, not stacked with another GLP-1.
includes: Practice Pack for the chosen GLP-1 (SOP + titration cadence + monograph)
GLP-1 informed consent at the agent's tier (Retatrutide → Tier 3, investigational)
Optional: GLP-1 Transition / Switch Protocol add-on
glp1_package.consent_tier_rule: = the chosen agent's tier (sema/tirze/lira → Tier 1; reta → Tier 3).
glp1_package.delivery: SOP/cadence/monograph sellable now; consent/intake via Visit Packet pending provider legal review.

weight_loss_stack.label: Weight-Loss Stack
weight_loss_stack.one_line: Any one GLP-1 backbone + Sermorelin and/or AOD-9604 — appetite control plus lean-mass / body-composition support.
weight_loss_stack.rationale: The GLP-1 drives appetite suppression and weight loss; Sermorelin (GH axis) and AOD-9604 (lipolysis) are cyclable adjuncts that complement it — addressing the lean-mass-loss concern with GLP-1 monotherapy — without overlapping its mechanism.
auto_assembles: Practice Pack per selected peptide (SOP + cadence + monograph)
Merged calendar — continuous GLP-1 titration + cycled adjunct schedule (staggered starts)
weight_loss_stack.consent_tier_rule: = HIGHEST tier among components (Sermorelin/AOD push to Tier 3–4; surfaced as a badge).
weight_loss_stack.delivery: Same gate — SOP/cadence/monograph sold; consent/intake via Visit Packet pending legal review.

pricing.model: bundle discount vs. individual Practice Packs

stack_builder.label: Metabolic Stack — Build Your Own (advanced)
stack_builder.one_line: Broader builder — compose from all cyclable adjuncts (Sermorelin, AOD-9604, MOTS-c, SS-31), optionally alongside ONE continuous GLP-1 backbone.

rules.no_two_glp1_reason: GLP-1/incretins overlap mechanistically and are continuous, not cycled — they are transitioned between, never co-administered. Selecting a second GLP-1 routes to the Transition Protocol instead.

example_invalid.why: Three GLP-1s cannot be stacked — overlap/continuous. Routes to Transition Protocol.

auto_assembles: One Practice Pack per selected peptide (SOP + cadence + monograph)
Per-peptide consent at each component's tier
Combination Consent Addendum (Desk Reference Ch.4 §5.1 — each peptide consented individually; combination carries less evidence; interactions may be unknown)
Merged titration / cycle calendar (staggered starts so a side effect is attributable to one agent)
stack_builder.consent_tier_rule: Stack tier = the HIGHEST consent tier among the selected components (Ch.4 §1.3). Surface it as a badge, e.g. 'This stack = Tier 3 (investigational) because it includes Retatrutide / MOTS-c.'
stack_builder.delivery: Same gate as Practice Pack — SOP/cadence/monograph sold; consent/intake via Visit Packet pending provider legal review.

pricing.model: bundle discount vs. buying each Practice Pack individually
pricing.price_note: TBD — set when Stripe links are wired.

lineup.label: Peptide Desk Reference (2026 Edition)
lineup.contents: all peptides + 'Intro to Peptide Therapy / How to Run a Peptide Practice' chapter; educational; annual edition

lineup.label: Peptide Practice Pack
lineup.sell_now: after legal (consent gated; SOP/cadence/monograph sellable now)

lineup.label: GLP-1 Package

lineup.label: Weight-Loss Stack
lineup.contents: any GLP-1 + Sermorelin and/or AOD-9604; combination addendum; merged calendar; tier = highest component

lineup.label: AllyOS Membership (Member / Top)
lineup.contents: library + Ally + Visit Packet (generates consent/intake live)
